name: setLinesColor
description: Sets the color of asterism lines. Asterism lines connect stars to form recognizable patterns like the Summer Triangle or Big Dipper. The color is specified as an RGB vector with values between 0 and 1.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector (R, G, B) where each component ranges from 0.0 to 1.0

name: getLinesColor
description: Returns the current color of asterism lines as an RGB vector. Each component (R, G, B) ranges from 0.0 to 1.0.
returnDescription: RGB color vector (R, G, B) of the current line color

name: setRayHelpersColor
description: Sets the color of ray helpers - auxiliary lines that show extensions of asterism patterns or additional cultural connections between stars.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector (R, G, B) with values between 0.0 and 1.0

name: getRayHelpersColor
description: Returns the current color of ray helper lines as an RGB vector.
returnDescription: RGB color vector (R, G, B) of the current ray helper color
example:
var rayColor = AsterismMgr.getRayHelpersColor();
core.debug("Ray helpers color - RGB(" + rayColor[0].toFixed(2) + ", " + rayColor[1].toFixed(2) + ", " + rayColor[2].toFixed(2) + ")");

name: setLabelsColor
description: Sets the color of asterism labels (names). Labels appear next to star patterns showing names like 'Summer Triangle', 'Big Dipper', or 'Northern Cross'.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector (R, G, B) with values between 0.0 and 1.0

name: getLabelsColor
description: Returns the current color of asterism labels as an RGB vector.
returnDescription: RGB color vector (R, G, B) of the current label color
example:
var labelColor = AsterismMgr.getLabelsColor();
core.debug("Label color - R: " + labelColor[0] + ", G: " + labelColor[1] + ", B: " + labelColor[2]);

name: setFontSize
description: Sets the font size used for displaying asterism labels (names). Larger sizes make text more readable, smaller sizes reduce visual clutter.

parameters.name: newFontSize
parameters.description: Font size in pixels (recommended range: 10 to 24)

name: getFontSize
description: Returns the current font size for asterism labels in pixels.
example:
var fontSize = AsterismMgr.getFontSize();
core.debug("Label font size: " + fontSize + " px");

name: setAsterismLineThickness
description: Sets the thickness of asterism lines in pixels. Thicker lines are more visible, thinner lines look more elegant and less intrusive.

name: getAsterismLineThickness
description: Returns the current thickness of asterism lines in pixels.
example:
var thickness = AsterismMgr.getAsterismLineThickness();
core.debug("Current line thickness: " + thickness);

name: setRayHelperThickness
description: Sets the thickness of ray helper lines in pixels. These auxiliary lines are typically thinner than main asterism lines.

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.description: Ray helper line thickness in pixels (minimum 1)

name: getRayHelperThickness
description: Returns the current thickness of ray helper lines in pixels.
returnDescription: Ray helper line thickness in pixels
example:
var rayThickness = AsterismMgr.getRayHelperThickness();
core.debug("Ray helper thickness: " + rayThickness + " px");

name: setFlagLines
description: Shows or hides asterism lines. When enabled, lines connecting stars to form recognizable patterns become visible.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show lines, false to hide them

name: getFlagLines
description: Returns whether asterism lines are currently visible.
returnDescription: true if lines are visible, false if hidden

name: setFlagLabels
description: Shows or hides asterism labels (names). When enabled, names like 'Summer Triangle' or 'Big Dipper' appear next to the star patterns.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide them

name: getFlagLabels
description: Returns whether asterism labels are currently visible.
returnDescription: true if labels are visible, false if hidden

name: setFlagRayHelpers
description: Shows or hides ray helpers - auxiliary lines that show extensions of asterism patterns or additional cultural star connections.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show ray helpers, false to hide them

name: getFlagRayHelpers
description: Returns whether ray helpers are currently visible.
returnDescription: true if ray helpers are visible, false if hidden

name: setLinesFadeDuration
description: Sets the fade duration for asterism lines when they appear or disappear. Controls how smoothly lines transition between visible and hidden states.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Fade duration in seconds (0 = instant, 1 = one second, 3 = slow fade)

name: getLinesFadeDuration
description: Returns the current fade duration for asterism lines in seconds.
example:
var fadeTime = AsterismMgr.getLinesFadeDuration();
core.debug("Line fade duration: " + fadeTime + " s");

name: setLabelsFadeDuration
description: Sets the fade duration for asterism labels when they appear or disappear. Provides smooth transitions for label visibility changes.

name: getLabelsFadeDuration
description: Returns the current fade duration for asterism labels in seconds.
example:
var labelFade = AsterismMgr.getLabelsFadeDuration();
core.debug("Label fade duration: " + labelFade + " s");

name: setRayHelpersFadeDuration
description: Sets the fade duration for ray helpers when they appear or disappear.

name: getRayHelpersFadeDuration
description: Returns the current fade duration for ray helpers in seconds.
example:
var rayFade = AsterismMgr.getRayHelpersFadeDuration();
core.debug("Ray helpers fade duration: " + rayFade + " s");

name: selectAsterism
description: Selects an asterism by its English name. This automatically enables isolation mode if not already active, hiding all other asterisms.

parameters.name: englishName
parameters.description: English name of the asterism (e.g., 'Summer Triangle', 'Big Dipper', 'Northern Cross', 'Winter Hexagon', 'Spring Diamond')

name: deselectAsterism
description: Removes a specific asterism from the selected list. If this was the only selected asterism and isolation mode is active, all asterisms will become hidden.

parameters.name: englishName
parameters.description: English name of the asterism to deselect

name: deselectAsterisms
description: Deselects all asterisms. If isolation mode is active, all asterisms will be hidden.

name: selectAllAsterisms
description: Selects all asterisms in the sky. Useful for displaying all available star patterns at once.

name: setFlagIsolateAsterismSelected
description: Enables or disables isolation mode for selected asterisms. When enabled, only selected asterisms are shown; all others are hidden.

parameters.name: isolate
parameters.description: true to enable isolation mode, false to disable

name: getFlagIsolateAsterismSelected
description: Returns whether isolation mode for selected asterisms is currently active.
returnDescription: true if isolation mode is active, false otherwise

name: isLinesDefined
description: Checks whether asterism lines are defined in the current sky culture. Some cultures may not have asterisms, or may have different definitions.
returnDescription: true if asterisms exist in the current culture, false otherwise
